EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO RE SET HEARING ON CLAIMS ON SURPLUS FUNDS AND DISTRIBUTION OF PREVIOUSLY AWARDED AND APPROVED ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS TO PETITIONER AND REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS ; REQUEST TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT FILED BY PETITIONER TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY
ORDER TO RE-SET HEARING ON CLAIMS ON SURPLUS FUNDS AND DISTRIBUTION OF PREVIOUSLY AWARDED AND APPROVED ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS TO PETITIONER AND REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY'S HEARING ON CLAIMS ON SURPLUS FUNDS AND DISTRIBUTION OF PREVIOUSLY AWARDED AND APPROVED ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS TO PETITIONER AND REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT ORDERS PAYMENT OF $19,985.39 TO TITLE TRUST. MODIFICATIONS: THE AMOUNT OF $27,394.63 WILL BE RETAINED BY THE COURT AND NOT BE DISBURSED AT THIS TIME. THE BALANCE WILL BE PAID OUT TO MR. PANZER AND THE PORTION THAT IS BEING HELD WILL BE SUBJECT TO A MOTION TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY MS. ROUSE NO LATER THAN APRIL 10, 2008. THE COURT ADVISED BOTH MS. ROUSE AND MS VOISENAT TO MEET AND CONFER. THE COURT ORDERED MR. LAWRENCE TO SUBMIT AN ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY'S MOTION TO DEPOSIT FUNDS, DISCHARGE LIABILITY, AND AWARD ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION IS GRANTED. TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY IS DIRECTED TO DEPOSIT THE SURPLUS FUNDS WITH THE COURT BY OCTOBER 19, 2007 PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 2924 J(C). TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY WILL THEN BE DISCHARGED OF FUTURE LIABILITY. THE HEARING ON CLAIMS ON THE SURPLUS FUNDS WILL BE HEARD ON DECEMBER 19, 2007. TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY IS AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS OF $14,550.53 AND THOSE FEES AND COSTS WILL BE DISTRIBUTED PER CIVIL CODE 2924 K(A) AT THE DECEMBER 19, 2007 HEARING. TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY SHOULD PREPARE AN ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS RULING AND CIVIL CODE SECTION 2924 J. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS WITH MODIFICATIONS: PETITIONER TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY'S Hearing On Claims On Surplus Funds And Distribution of previously awarded and approved attorneys fees and costs to petitioner and request for additional fees and costs. THE COURT ORDERS PAYMENT OF $19985.39 TO TITLE TRUST. MODIFICATIONS: THE AMOUNT OF $27,394.63 WILL BE RETAINED BY THE COURT AND NOT BE DISBURSED AT THIS TIME. THE BALANCE WILL BE PAID OUT TO MR. PANZER AND THE PORTION THAT IS BEING HELD WILL BE SUBJECT TO A MOTION TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY MS. ROUSE NO LATER THAN APRIL 10, 2008. THE COURT ADVISED BOTH MS. ROUSE AND MS VOISENAT TO MEET AND CONFER. THE COURT ORDERED MR. LAWRENCE TO SUBMIT AN ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/PM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deposit Funds, Discharge Liability, And Award Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAYMOND G. ALVARDADO OF ADORNO, YOSS ALVARADO & SMITH, TEL. NO. (714) 852-6800 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PETITIONER TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY'S Motion To Deposit Funds, Discharge Liability, And Award Attorneys' Fees And Costs, NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION IS GRANTED. TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY IS DIRECTED TO DEPOSIT THE SURPLUS FUNDS WITH THE COURT BY OCTOBER 19, 2007 PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 2924 J(C). TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY WILL THEN BE DISCHARGED OF FUTURE LIABILITY. THE HEARING ON CLAIMS ON THE SURPLUS FUNDS WILL BE HEARD ON DECEMBER 19, 2007. TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY IS AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS OF $14,550.53 AND THOSE FEES AND COSTS WILL BE DISTRIBUTED PER CIVIL CODE 2924 K(A) AT THE DECEMBER 19, 2007 HEARING. TITLE TRUST DEED SERVICE COMPANY SHOULD PREPARE AN ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS RULING AND CIVIL CODE SECTION 2924 J. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =301/PJB/PM
